trigger: /sync, /scrape * (final step — ONLY after all scraping completes and validates)
single_responsibility: SOLE writer of sync-status.json. Runs last.

output.sync_status: object<{last_sync: ISO8601, total_content: int, new_since_last: int, scrape_state: 'clean'|'partial'|'error', url_hashes: object<url, hash>, errors: array}>

critical_note: If write fails 3x: rollback all scraped files from this run, preserve old sync-status.json
